      "question": "Which of the following is a correct property of a balanced binary search tree?",
      "options": ["A) All interior nodes are leaf nodes", "B) All nodes have the same number of children", "C) The height of the left subtree plus one is less than or equal to the height of the right subtree for all interior nodes", "D) None of the above"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "A balanced binary search tree ensures that the height of the left subtree p
